title: ScanSnap iX2500 Black – Ultra High Speed 45 ppm/90 ipm Duplex Scanner, 100‑Sheet ADF, 600 dpi Optical, 5″ Touchscreen, Wi-Fi 6-Bluetooth-USB 3.2 Gen 1×1 Multi‑Device Connectivity
features: Ultra-Fast Performance – Scan up to 45 pages per minute / 90 images per minute with duplex scanning, ideal for high-volume workflows in home offices or small businesses
Smart Touchscreen Operation – Intuitive 5-inch colour LCD lets you scan, preview, and send documents with a single tap—no PC required
High-Capacity ADF – The 100-sheet Automatic Document Feeder handles mixed document types and sizes with ease, reducing manual input and saving time
Crystal-Clear Image Quality – Capture every detail with up to 600 dpi optical resolution, perfect for text, images, receipts, and detailed documents
Versatile Connectivity – Connect seamlessly via Wi-Fi, Bluetooth, or USB 3.2 Gen 1 for flexible scanning to desktop, mobile, or cloud destinations
Built for Heavy Use – Designed for durability with a daily duty cycle of up to 4,000 sheets, supporting consistent, long-term performance
Compact & Professional Design – Stylish black finish with a space-saving footprint: just 292 x 161 x 152 mm and only 3.3 kg, perfect for any desktop setup
Advanced Paper Handling – Easily scans everything from business cards to long-form documents up to 3,000 mm in length, including folded A3
Reliable & Intelligent – Features built-in jam reduction, multi-feed detection, and auto-rotation for consistent, accurate results every time
Peace of Mind Guaranteed – Backed by a manufacturer warranty for added confidence; simply register your product online after purchase to activate coverage and access support

Introducing the iX2500.... Merchant video Previous page Next page 1 Get Started 2 Types of Scans 3 Fits Where You Work 4 Effortless Experience 5 Photo Scanning Reliable and Seamless Wi-Fi Connectivity Convenient and secure wireless connectivity enables standalone operation and flexible placement. Compatible with 2.4 GHz, 5 GHz, and Wi-Fi 6 networks. Designed for Reliable, Jam-Free Operation Advanced feed technology ensures smooth paper handling with a brake roller separation system. A multi-feed sensor prevents missed pages, while skew detection protects documents from damage. Made with recycled materials The scanner chassis is constructed using 25% or more recycled pre-consumer plastic. Packaging is entirely free from virgin plastics, supporting more sustainable business practices. Includes receipt guide Easily scan batches of smaller items like receipts and business cards with this handy removable accessory. Is the ScanSnap iX2500 compatible with both Windows and macOS? Yes. The ScanSnap iX2500 supports both Windows and macOS operating systems. It works seamlessly with ScanSnap Home software, ensuring a consistent user experience across platforms. Can I scan directly to cloud services like Dropbox or Google Drive? Yes. With built-in Wi-Fi and ScanSnap Home, you can scan directly to popular cloud services including Dropbox, Google Drive, OneDrive, and more—no PC required. How fast is the ScanSnap iX2500? The iX2500 scans up to 40 pages per minute (ppm) in duplex mode. It’s designed for high-efficiency workflows, making it ideal for both home and office environments. What types of documents can it handle? The iX2500 can scan a wide range of documents including A4, receipts, business cards, and even folded A3 using the carrier sheet. It also features intelligent paper feeding to prevent jams and misfeeds. Does the scanner require a PC to operate? No. Thanks to its intuitive touchscreen and Wi-Fi connectivity, the iX2500 can operate as a standalone device. You can scan directly to cloud, email, or network folders without needing a computer.
